summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SafeSpect Violation Navigator with 4 new features. All backend APIs working correctly including new sorting and similar violations endpoints. Frontend UI fully functional with new X clear button, violation row clicks, and column sorting. All previous features (search, filters, AI search, pagination) still working correctly.
passed_tests: API root endpoint returns 'SafeSpect Violation Navigator API' (no NSP/Carrier Enforcement references)
GET /violations sorting functionality working for all columns (oos, violation_class, regulatory_reference, violation_text, level_iii, critical, violation_code, cfr_part)
GET /violations/{id}/similar endpoint working correctly (found 60 similar violations for test violation)
Title correctly shows 'SafeSpect Violation Navigator' without NSP/Carrier Enforcement references
X clear button in search bar: hidden when empty, appears when text entered, clears text successfully, disappears after clearing
Clicking violation rows opens similar violations sheet with selected violation details and list of similar violations
Similar violations sheet displays proper formatting, badges, and regulatory references
Column header sorting clickable and functional
Search functionality still works (tire: 36 results, driver fatigue AI: 54 results)
AI search toggle functionality working correctly
All existing filters, search, and data display functionality preserved
Backend API performance: 35/35 tests passed (100% success rate)
Frontend integration: All new features working with backend APIs

success_percentage.backend: 100% (35/35 tests passed including new sorting and similar violations endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all new features working, minor DOM interaction issues during rapid automated testing)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (frontend-backend integration working correctly for all new features)
